reasoning: The control CM-8(2) focuses on maintaining a system component inventory and baseline configuration. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that resources such as Pods, Nodes, ConfigMaps, and Secrets are properly labeled and versioned to maintain an accurate inventory and configuration management. Labeling helps in identifying and categorizing resources, while versioning ensures that baseline configurations are tracked and managed.
